name: RABBIT-SPEC-BUG-1
title: rabbit-spec SKILL.md not published to .claude/skills/ — missing build script entry and drift detection
description: rabbit-spec is a standalone feature with a SKILL.md but it is not deployed to .claude/skills/rabbit-spec/SKILL.md and not drift-protected. Issues: (1) .claude/skills/rabbit-spec/ does not exist — any Skill('rabbit-spec') call from rabbit-feature-touch Step 3 will fail at runtime. (2) build-contract.json has no copy-file entry to publish the skill on build. (3) sync-check.py (Stop hook drift detection) does not monitor the deployed copy for drift against the feature source. Fix: add copy-file entry in build-contract.json, create initial deployed copy, add drift check on Stop consistent with other skills (e.g. rabbit-feature-touch).

history.note: Deployed SKILL.md to .claude/skills/rabbit-spec/SKILL.md and added copy-file entry to build-contract.json with check_on_stop: true
